task_objective: Fix stale 'Last Operation' display when QAM opens after automatic background start/exit sync events
design_decisions: Decoupled history state from settings payload and exposed it via a new dedicated RPC endpoint `get_game_history`.
Synchronized history on mount in index.tsx's `initialLoad` by calling `getGameHistoryCall` after `getSettings`.

Integrated a background listener update mechanism in React component mount hook to allow background auto-sync hook handlers to update the UI memory cache without causing React unmount memory leak warnings.
Added proactive background history updates in both start/exit hook execution `finally` blocks in index.tsx.
results: 250/250 tests passed, frontend builds cleanly with pnpm, ruff formatting and ty type checks pass successfully
